arrow_plan.source_fact: Upper dashed capture ray runs from the display to the smartphone.
Lower dashed capture ray runs from the display to the smartphone.
Fast-time arrow runs rightward above the four subframes.
First subframe feeds the human eye.
Second subframe feeds the human eye.
Third subframe feeds the human eye.
Fourth subframe feeds the human eye.
The human eye feeds the readable display.
The selected second subframe feeds the camera.
The camera outputs one unreadable fragment.
The unreadable fragment reaches OCR failure.
